depression.description: I find it really hard to express my anger without feeling like I'm going to ruin my friendships. It's like I have to keep everything bottled up, and it just makes me feel worse.
Whenever I feel upset and want to voice my opinions, I worry that I will end up alone. The thought of being disliked by my friends is terrifying.
I often put off my work because I'm so scared of making mistakes. This anxiety just makes it harder for me to get things done, and then I feel even worse about myself.
I constantly feel like I'm unlovable and that people will eventually abandon me. It's a heavy burden that makes it hard to connect with others.

Delusion.description: I often feel like my friends don't really understand me, especially when I try to share my feelings. It leads me to think they judge me instead of supporting me.
I believe that if I share my true thoughts or feelings, I will be rejected or disliked. This belief keeps me from being authentic in my relationships.
